name: Simo Häyhä
longDesc: Surnommé la « Mort blanche », Simo Häyhä est le tireur d'élite le plus meurtrier de l'histoire avec plus de 500 victoires confirmées en quelques mois de guerre d'Hiver. Carte WC4 infanterie tier-S or à bonus couvert/neige : pick culte finlandais.

skills.name: Ace Sniper
skills.desc: 100% chance to give the enemy a critical attack and attack range +1 when commanding infantry unit (If the general has this skill, the effects of Infantry Leader are inapplicable.)

skills.name: Deterrence
skills.desc: After dealing a critical attack to enemy, the enemy unit's attack will be decreased by 8%, effective for one turn

skills.name: Guerrilla
skills.desc: 24% chance that the enemy will not fight back when commanding infantry units

skills.name: Camouflage
skills.desc: Able to dodge 12% damage from the enemy's air units

skills.name: Raider
skills.desc: Deal +18% damage to the enemy when commanding infantry units

sources: Données extraites des fichiers de jeu World Conqueror 4
longDescEn: Nicknamed 'the White Death', Simo Häyhä is the deadliest sniper in history, with over 500 confirmed kills in a few months of the Winter War. A WC4 tier-S gold infantry card with cover and snow bonuses — Finland's cult pick.
longDescDe: „Der weiße Tod“ Simo Häyhä ist mit über 500 bestätigten Abschüssen in wenigen Monaten des Winterkriegs der tödlichste Scharfschütze der Geschichte. Im WC4 eine S-Klasse-Gold-Infanteriekarte mit Deckungs- und Schneeboni — Finnlands Kultwahl.
